detail.description:
Relax your mind!

Designed to soothe your mind and ease your stress, this anti-stress relaxing game offers a delightful collection of mini-games. Engage in a variety of calming activities, each carefully crafted to provide a sense of peace and joy. 

Have a break!

Relax your mind, relieve your stress and enjoy challenging yet relaxing puzzles. The gameplay is designed to be non-competitive and stress-free, with no pressure to achieve perfection. Instead, the focus is on providing a peaceful env
